LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT FAINA FILIMONOVA'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT IS OFF CALENDAR. ON OCTOBER 4, 2013, THE COURT ISSUED AN ORDER SETTING ASIDE DEFAULT AND VACATING DEFAULT JUDGMENT AS TO THE MOVING PARTY, DEFENDANT FAINA FILIMINOVA. JUDGE: LESLIE C. NICHOLS; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185 (302)
CRC 3.740 REVIEW. (610)
CRC 3.740 REVIEW. (610)

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FILIMONOVA, FAINA $1,844.57 PRINCIPAL, $237.66 INTEREST, $310.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,392.23, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-15-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT FAINA FILIMONOVA'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT IS OFF CALENDAR. ON OCTOBER 4, 2013, THE COURT ISSUED AN ORDER SETTING ASIDE DEFAULT AND VACATING DEFAULT JUDGMENT AS TO THE MOVING PARTY, DEFENDANT FAINA FILIMINOVA. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185
